products.name: Parylene Coating Service
products.descriptor: CVD-applied Parylene conformal coating service for electronic components

evidence.snippet: The choice of deposition technique heavily influences the properties of the coating. We use several deposition techniques at HZO including Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD) and Plasma-Enhanced Chemical Vapor Deposition (PECVD).

products.name: PECVD Nanocoating Service
products.descriptor: Plasma-enhanced CVD nanocoating service for temperature-sensitive electronics substrates

evidence.snippet: The choice of deposition technique heavily influences the properties of the coating. We use several deposition techniques at HZO including Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD) and Plasma-Enhanced Chemical Vapor Deposition (PECVD).

products.name: Turnkey Coating Solution
products.descriptor: End-to-end Parylene and nanocoating service integrating people, processes, materials, and equipment

evidence.snippet: HZO's Turnkey Parylene Coating and Nanocoating Solution

Our ready-to-deploy turnkey coating solution provides our customers with all aspects of the
nanocoating or Parylene process for convenience, consistency, and
peace of mind. People, processes, material science expertise, and equipment are
at the heart of our turnkey solution, no matter the business model you choose.

unresolved_questions: The dedicated Parylene Coatings page (hzo.com/coatings/parylene-coating) and PECVD/plasma nanocoatings page (hzo.com/coatings/plasma-applied-nanocoatings) were skipped due to class budget exhaustion; fetching them would provide richer product detail and may reveal additional named service tiers or SKUs for the Parylene Coating Service and PECVD Nanocoating Service entries.
